name: subagent contract validator accepts an agent file with all required frontmatter fields present
command:
printf -- '---
name: x
model: sonnet
prompt_id: x
prompt_version: 1.0
model_rationale: cost-quality balance for triage
eval_dataset: evals/datasets/agents/x.jsonl
prompt_migration_status: original
---
' > agent.md && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/agents/validate-contract.sh" --agent agent.md 2>out.txt && grep -q 'valid=true' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
